title: Sausage and Fennel Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Italian-inspired stir fry made with sweet sausage and crunchy fennel. Serve with crusty bread or over rice for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced fennel and cook for 5 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced sausage and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through.
Season with salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Serve the sausage and fennel mixture hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Optional: Serve with crusty bread or over cooked rice.
